# Mission 002 — boundary pattern, full success

`VAL-mission-002-boundary-pattern`

| kind | status |
|---|---|
| validation | draft |

Gemma 4 E2B completes a clockwise boundary pattern mission (4 waypoints) with 4/4 correct decisions and autonomous RTL at mission completion. Demonstrates that the V1.0 architecture meets the visual grounding and explainability needs: the model reasons from the map image, maintains continuity via the scratchpad, and the reasoning log is coherent and accurate post-flight.

**Method:** demonstration · **scope:** [CMP-mission-computer](../../system/CMP-mission-computer/README.md) · **latest outcome:** passed

## Executions

| date | outcome | notes |
|---|---|---|
| 2026-06-02 | passed | Run 20260602_205327. 6 decisions total: transit_started, 4x waypoint_reached, RTL issued by model on final decision without prompting. Scratchpad active; progress/next_intent fields visible in decisions.jsonl. Model described visible roads and relative position in reasoning field before choosing each waypoint. Evidence: mission_manager/missions/20260602_205327_*/decisions.jsonl
